\tzpentry{ID3284}{Antipodal Helix Pair Parametrization}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3284 introduces Antipodal Helix Pair Parametrization as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathbf{s}_1(t, \Omega) &= \mathcal{R}( \Omega t) \cdot \begin{pmatrix} R \cos(2 \pi t/P) \\ R \sin(2 \pi t/P) \\ t \end{pmatrix} \\ \mathbf{s}_2(t, \Omega) &= \mathcal{R}( \Omega t) \cdot \begin{pmatrix} R \cos(2 \pi t/P + \pi) \\ R \sin(2 \pi t/P + \pi) \\ t \end{pmatrix} \end{align}
